Bash(cat > "/c/Users/shanmukha.mudragadda/Desktop/Executive-Management/apps/backend/Dockerfile" << 'DOCKEREOF'
FROM node:20-alpine

WORKDIR /app

COPY package*.json ./
RUN npm ci --only=production

COPY prisma ./prisma/
RUN npx prisma generate

COPY dist ./dist/

EXPOSE 3000

CMD ["node", "dist/index.js"]
DOCKEREOF
echo "Created Dockerfile")
